name: Baltimore-DC Corridor
author: rslurry
description:
Uses 2023 LODES data.  Coverage spans from Mount Vernon in the south, Germantown in the west, Timonium in the north, and Martin State Airport/Annapolis in the east.
Includes demand for DCA, BWI, and MTN airports; 5 JHU campuses, MSU, UMB, UMBC, UMD College Park, Loyola, Towson, American U, George Washington U, Georgetown, Howard, Catholic U, and Bowie State universities; the National Aquarium and Zoo, Camden Yards, M&T Bank Stadium, Library of Congress, Capital, Supreme Court, White House, and the National Mall (split up between the Lincoln, Washington, Jefferson, MLK, FDR, Vietnam War, Korean War, and WW2 memorials + the Smithsonian Air & Space, Natural History, and American History museums).
